titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Yale Club of New York City Photograph Collection
Yale Club of New York City Photograph Collection
titlestmt.author: compiled by Daniel Hartwig

controlnote.p: This encoded finding aid is compliant with the Yale EAD Best Practice Guidelines, Version 1.0.

descriptivenote.p: Finding aid description and metadata in Archives at Yale are licensed under a CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. This means that anyone may copy, modify, and distribute this descriptive metadata without restriction or permission. The CC0 license is explained in full on the Creative Commons website: CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. More information is available on our Help page.

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Saturday November 7, 2020 at 10:45

did.unittitle: Yale Club of New York City photograph collection
did.abstract: The collection contains photographs and pictures collected by the Yale Club of New York City, including some original artwork.

corpname.part: Yale Club of New York City

odd.head: General note
odd.p: Forms part of Yale Record Group 48-A (YRG 48-A), Yale pictorial records and collections.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Yale Club of New York City Photograph Collection (RU 777). Manuscripts and Archives, Yale University Library.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The collection contains photographs and pictures collected by the Yale Club of New York City, including some original artwork.

corpname.part: Yale Club of New York City

did.unittitle: Harkness Tower sketch by J. Diedricksen [damaged]
Dinner given to Liang Tun Yen by his classmates of Yale '82 [damaged]
Jess Willard standing over Jack Johnson while the referee in counting [photo made at Havana] [damaged]
Old Campus, New Haven Green, Old State House
Benjamin Silliman statue outside Farnam Hall
Interior of Mory's - The Green Cup on table
Dwight Hall, Alumni Hall, Durfee Hall
Luther Tucker, George Stewart, Bill Phelps, James Angell, unidentified men [in academic robes]
Nathaniel Shipman, Yale 1848, U.S. Circuit Court judge
Elihu B. Frost, Howard H. Knapp, Franklin E. Worcester, Louis K. Hull, Henry T. Folsom
Graduating class of 1872 in Old Chapel
Sketch of Harkness Tower by Loring Gary Calkins, '06S
Jay Coe, class of 1898, in room
Room of Samuel B. Hawley and Albert Lucas, class of 1884S
Kent Hall and Sloane Physics Laboratory
